title: malaxis abieticola
intro: Malaxis abieticola is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, also known as the fir-spur orchid. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Malaxis abieticola include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
